neutral: Price is chopping around the 50 EMA
20 EMA and 50 EMA are flat or tangled together

long: RSI (14) crosses above 50 while price is already above the 50 EMA
20 EMA is above the 50 EMA (trend confirmation)
short: RSI (14) crosses below 50 while price is already below the 50 EMA
20 EMA is below the 50 EMA (trend confirmation)

exit_rules: Exit a winning long when the 20 EMA crosses back below the 50 EMA
Exit a winning short when the 20 EMA crosses back above the 50 EMA
Hard stop on a long: 2x ATR (14) below entry price
Hard stop on a short: 2x ATR (14) above entry price
risk_rules: Risk a maximum of 1% of account per trade
Only take trades where reward:risk is at least 1:2
If I take 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
notes: Daily trend-following momentum on a 50-name AI watchlist. Default sensible-defaults strategy chosen for active (daily) swing trading. Read-and-advise only — no orders are placed. Adjust any rule in plain English anytime.
